zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard De Rodes II於1218年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾時，他的父親Ralph de Rodes38歲，母親Berthe de MELLE29歲。他於1240年之前與Catherine de Cysoing結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年在英國林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerard De Rodes II于1218年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾时，他的父亲Ralph de Rodes38岁，母亲Berthe de MELLE29岁。他于1240年之前与Catherine de Cysoing结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1272年在英国林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rodes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan (Rodés): habitational name from any of several places called Rodés, mainly those in El Pallars and El Conflent districts, in northern Catalonia.
Catalan: variant of Roda , from Catalan rodes, plural of roda ‘wheel’.
English: variant of   Rhodes  . Compare   Rhode  .

variants.name: Rudes
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Rudež: nickname derived from rud ‘red, reddish’, or, alternatively, from rud ‘curly’ (standard Slovenian rod; compare Rodes ). In Croatia, the surname is also found in the form Rudeš.

variants.name: Roda
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Arturo, Francisco, Domingos, Manuel, Mario, Alfredo, Amandio, Andres, Angel, Eduardo, Elia, Gustavo, Joaquim.

Catalan: habitational name from any of various places called Roda, for example Roda de Ter, Roda de Berà, Roda de Ribagorça, from Catalan roda ‘wheel’ (from Latin rota), possibly denoting a waterwheel.
German: habitational name from any of numerous places, particularly in central eastern Germany, named Roda or Rhoda.

variants.name: Rodas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Jorge, Juan, Ana, Jaime, Rafael, Elvira, Manuel, Miguel, Raul.
Galician and Portuguese: habitational name from any of the three places in Galicia, Spain, named Rodas (in Lugo, Ourense, and Pontevedra provinces), from the plural of roda ‘wheel’.

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard De Rodes II was born in 1218, in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph de Rodes, was 38 and his mother, Berthe de MELLE, was 29. He married Catherine de Cysoing before 1240. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1272, in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard De Rodes II est né en 1218, à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph de Rodes, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Berthe de MELLE, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Cysoing avant 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1272, à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerard De Rodes II 1218 in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Rodes 38 und seine Mutter Berthe de MELLE 29. Er hat vor 1240 Catherine de Cysoing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1272 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard De Rodes II è nato il nel 1218 nel Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph de Rodes, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Berthe de MELLE, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Catherine de Cysoing prima del 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1272, nel Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard De Rodes IIが1218年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールンカストルで生まれた時，父Ralph de Rodesは38歳，母Berthe de MELLEは29歳であった。1240年以前にCatherine de Cysoingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1272年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールンカストルで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard De Rodes II(이)가 1218년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호른카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Rodes(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Berthe de MELLE(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1240년 이전 Catherine de Cysoing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 영국 링코실르 호른카스틀에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard De Rodes II nasceu em 1218, em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph de Rodes, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Berthe de MELLE, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de Cysoing antes 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1272, em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard De Rodes II родился в 1218 г. в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph de Rodes было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Berthe de MELLE, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Cysoing перед 1240 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1272 г. в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerard De Rodes II nació en 1218, en Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph de Rodes, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Berthe de MELLE, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Catherine de Cysoing antes de 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1272, en Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
